headcount_quote: As of December 31, 2025, we had approximately 16,000 full-time employees. Of these, approximately 10,900 (68%) were located in the United States and Canada, 2,500 (16%) in Europe, Middle East, and Africa, 1,900 (12%) in Asia-Pacific and 700 (4%) in Latin America.
research_notes: Netflix FY2025 10-K (filed January 23, 2026; accession 0001065280-26-000034; CIK 1065280). Reports ~16,000 full-time employees. Only breakdown provided is geographic: US/Canada 68%, EMEA 16%, APAC 12%, LATAM 4%. No functional/role breakdown disclosed anywhere in 10-K. Expense line items (tech & development, marketing, G&A) disclosed in dollars only, not mapped to headcount. Content production part-time/temporary workers noted separately but uncounted. AI-generated search summaries fabricated functional breakdowns — excluded. Roles array empty per real-filings-only policy.
